title: Rapture (Corrupted Data) (THIS MOD IS UNDER REMASTER))
description: A Minecraft horror mod that progressively gets more unsettling. (Under REMASTER!!!!)
body:
### **Read description pls** # **RAPTURE (Corrupted Data)** ## *"The longer you stay, the angrier they get."* ---

This mod is a slow horror (ARG) mod. All events are randomized with chances. Different situations will happen in each world.

--- ## **Important Note:** --- 1. Mod can generate **.TXT files** on your computer (toggleable using **/enablesafemode**). 2. Mod can know your **name**. 3. Events are completely random (with chances). 4. Entities can **lock your camera**. 5. Entities can **kick or ban** you from your world (toggleable using **/disableban**). 6. Mod is **HEAVILY** inspired by the **broken script.** 7. Drop all suggestions below (and hate comments, idk). 8. Idk what to put here. --- ## **CREDITS:** --- **iRedMC** – Tester, Suggester **DktrPhil** – Alpha Minecraft Textures ---
